name: @openvole/paw-scraper
description: Extract structured data from web pages

tools.name: scrape_page
tools.description: Fetch a URL and extract structured data (text, links, tables, headings)

tools.name: scrape_links
tools.description: Extract all links from a web page

tools.name: scrape_tables
tools.description: Extract HTML tables as structured data

tools.name: scrape_selector
tools.description: Extract content matching a CSS selector
